overview.description: The Tradr 1.5X Short NVDA Daily ETF (NVDS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides inverse (-1.5x) exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Nvidia stock. NVDS was launched on Jul 14, 2022 and is issued by Tradr.
